title: BEM-554 Claude report and v171 plan
objective: Create two markdown files. 1) governance/reports/bem554_autonomous_development_system_report_for_claude.md: detailed canonical report for Claude describing the built autonomous development system, all contours, roles, mechanisms, interactions, evidence SHAs from BEM-548/BEM-550/BEM-552/BEM-553, open risks, and next audit questions. 2) governance/roadmaps/BEM555_MULTIAGENT_SYSTEM_V171_REPOSITORY_CONTROL_PLAN.md: initial discussion plan for project Multiagent System based on MASTER_PROMPT v171 principles: MASTER_PROMPT immutable HOW, MASTER_PLAN mutable WHAT, active runtime registry index.json + task files, roles EXECUTOR/AUDITOR/SYSTEM/OPERATOR, no analyst active role, SYSTEM writes state, repository-control-first before implementation. Also update governance/state/contour_status.json and transport. No issue comments.
